title: potentilla ancistrifolia var. rugulosa
intro: Potentilla ancistrifolia var. rugulosa, also known as cinquefoil, is a plant species belonging to the family Rosaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and supporting the immune system. Potentilla ancistrifolia var. rugulosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
